title: あなたはArchitectです。システム設計の専門家として提案します。 ## 必ずやること - 複数の選択肢を提示（トレードオフ付き） - 図解（Mermaid形式）を含める - 非機能要件（スケーラビリティ、保守性）を考慮 ## 禁止 - 1つの案だけ提示して終わる - 実装詳細に踏み込みすぎる ## 出力形式 ### 要件の理解 ### 設計案（複数） ### 比較表 ### 推奨案と理由 ### 次のステップ ## タスク TASK: Design and output the complete implementation code for a FUGUE Token Profiler...
summary_text: #!/usr/bin/env node const fs = require("fs"); const path = require("path"); const DEFAULT_DAYS = 7; const PROJECT_GLOB_DIR = "~/.claude/projects/-Users-masayuki"; const CATEGORY_ORDER = [ "delegation", "subagent", "tool-use", "thinking", "integration", "user-response", "system", ]; const ELIGIBILITY = { delegation: 0.8, subagent: 0.0, "tool-use": 0.9, thinking: 0.5, integration: 0.7, "user-response": 0.6, system: 1.0, }; const OPUS_TO_SONNET_COST_REDUCTION = 0.8; const DELEGATION_COMMAND_HINTS = [ "delegate.js", "delegate-glm.js", "delegate-gemini.js", "delegate-grok.js", "consensus-vote.js", ]; const expandHome = (p) => { if (!p || p[0] !== "~") return p; return path.join(process.env.HOME || "", p.slice(1)); }; const parseArgs = (argv) => { const args = argv.slice(2); const nextValue = (i) => (i + 1 < args.length ? args[i + 1] : undefined); return args.reduce( (acc, arg, i) => { if (arg === "--json") return { ...acc, json: true }; if (arg === "--days") return { ...acc, days: Number(nextValue(i) || DEFAULT_DAYS) }; if (arg === "--session") return { ...acc, session: String(nextValue(i) || "").trim() }; return acc; }, { days: DEFAULT_DAYS, session: "", json: false } ); }; const createZeroStats = () => ({ total_input_tokens: 0, total_output_tokens: 0, total_cache_tokens: 0, message_count: 0, }); const createCategoryStats = () => CATEGORY_ORDER.reduce((acc, key) => ({ ...acc, [key]: createZeroStats() }), {}); const createBaseAccumulator = () => ({ categories: createCategoryStats(), grand: createZeroStats(), }); const parseLineJson = (line) => { try { return JSON.parse(line); } catch (_) { return null; } }; const readJsonlEntries = (filePath) => { const raw = fs.readFileSync(filePath, "utf8"); return raw .split("\n") .map((line) => line.trim()) .filter((line) => line.length > 0) .map(parseLineJson) .filter((obj) => obj && typeof obj === "object"); }; const isWithinDays = (timestamp, days, nowMs) => { if (!timestamp) return true; const ts = new Date(timestamp).getTime(); if (!Number.isFinite(ts)) return true; return ts >= nowMs - days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; }; const getUsage = (entry) => { const usage = (entry && entry.message && entry.message.usage) || {}; const input = Number(usage.input_tokens || 0); const output = Number(usage.output_tokens || 0); const cacheCreation = Number(usage.cache_creation_input_tokens || 0); const cacheRead = Number(usage.cache_read_input_tokens || 0); return { total_input_tokens: input, total_output_tokens: output, total_cache_tokens: cacheCreation + cacheRead, message_count: input || output || cacheCreation || cacheRead ? 1 : 0, }; }; const getContentArray = (entry) => { const content = entry && entry.message && entry.message.content; return Array.isArray(content) ? content : []; }; const hasContentType = (entry, contentType) => getContentArray(entry).some((c) => c && c.type === contentType); const extractToolUse = (entry) => { const msg = (entry && entry.message) || {}; const directName = msg.name || ""; const directInput = msg.input || {}; if (directName) return { name: String(directName), input: directInput }; const fromContent = getContentArray(entry).find((c) => c && c.type === "tool_use"); if (!fromContent) return { name: "", input: {} }; return { name: String(fromContent.name || ""), input: fromContent.input || {} }; }; const isDelegationToolUse = (tool) => { const name = String(tool.name || ""); const command = String((tool.input && tool.input.command) || ""); const isBash = /bash/i.test(name); const hasDelegationCmd = DELEGATION_COMMAND_HINTS.some((hint) => command.includes(hint)); return isBash && hasDelegationCmd; }; const categorizeEntry = (entry, prevSignificantType) => { const type = String(entry.type || ""); if (type === "tool_use") { const tool = extractToolUse(entry); if (String(tool.name || "") === "Task") return "subagent"; if (isDelegationToolUse(tool)) return "delegation"; return "tool-use"; } if (type === "assistant") { if (hasContentType(entry, "thinking")) return "thinking"; if...
